response.justification: Strong senior developer with broad full-stack experience, Linux/open-source background, and a genuine track record building open-source platforms. However, the role requires German C1 and the candidate lists only Basic German, which is a hard requirement gap. Leadership and architecture experience is present but mostly as an individual contributor rather than formal team lead/head-of-development capacity.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with strong open-source and Linux orientation
Proven architecture work on distributed/event-driven systems (GISCollective, Sociomantic micro-services)
Track record of mentoring via workshops, courses, and dojos
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails C1 requirement
No explicit formal team-lead or Head-of-Development title; leadership evidence is indirect
Limited explicit UML, requirements management, and compliance/risk experience in resume

key_factors.factor: Lack of explicit leadership/management role history
